channel.title: Energy Price Board — TRON Energy Rental Blog
channel.description: Latest guides, news and analysis about TRON energy rental. Platform reviews, price trends, and tips to minimize transaction costs.

item.title: How SUN Rates Work: The Hidden Engine of TRON Energy Pricing
item.description: Every energy rental platform quotes prices in SUN — not TRX. But what is a SUN, how is it set, and why does a 65k energy rental cost 3 TRX on one site and 9 on another? We trace a rental order from browser click to on-chain delegation.

item.title: Burning TRX Is Dead: Rent Energy and Keep Your Money
item.description: Burning 14 TRX every time you send USDT is boomer behavior. With energy rental you pay 1.2-3 TRX for the same transaction and keep the rest. This guide breaks down exactly how much you save per transfer.

item.title: Build Your Own Energy Bot: API Comparison Across 5 Platforms
item.description: Five platforms have proper REST APIs for energy rental — iTRX, Tronex Energy, MeFree, Feee.io, and Tronify. Each does auth differently. We show the curl commands, gotchas, and a Python wrapper that picks the cheapest option.

item.title: 65k vs 130k vs 200k: Which Energy Amount Actually Saves You Money?
item.description: The conventional wisdom says: 65k energy for a simple USDT transfer, 130k if the receiving wallet doesn't have USDT. But we tested 500 transactions and found the real numbers are messier. Some platforms give 15-minute bursts cheaper than hourly.
